description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run VOLK tests that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have four jobs: build-ubuntu, build-ubuntu-static, build-windows, and build-macos. Each job should run on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest respectively), check out the repository, install dependencies, update submodules, configure, build, and test the project.
